task: Find full-time legal occupation jobs in San Diego County with a minimum salary of $4,000+ per month.
final_result_response:
I now have all 7 job listings. Here's the complete summary of full-time legal occupation jobs in San Diego County with a minimum salary of $4,000+ per month found on CalCareers (via ca.gov):

**7 jobs found:**

1. **ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE** — Dept. of Social Services | Salary: $10,588 - $15,263/mo | Permanent Fulltime | Filing Deadline: 3/5/2026

2. **ATTORNEY IV** — Dept. of Transportation | Salary: $11,993 - $16,096/mo | Permanent Fulltime | Filing Deadline: 3/5/2026

3. **DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL III** (Correctional Law Section) — Dept. of Justice | Salary: $10,852 - $15,325/mo | Permanent Fulltime | Filing Deadline: Until Filled

4. **DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL IV** (Criminal Prosecutions Attorney) — Dept. of Justice | Salary: $11,993 - $16,096/mo | Permanent Fulltime | Filing Deadline: 3/6/2026

5. **DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL IV** (Special Prosecutions Attorney) — Dept. of Justice | Salary: $11,993 - $16,096/mo | Permanent Fulltime | Filing Deadline: 3/12/2026

6. **DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL IV** (Employment Law Section) — Dept. of Justice | Salary: $11,993 - $16,096/mo | Permanent Fulltime | Filing Deadline: 3/30/2026

7. **DEPUTY LABOR COMMISSIONER II** (Wage Hearing Deputy) — Dept. of Industrial Relations | Salary: $7,100 - $9,494/mo | Permanent Fulltime | Filing Deadline: 3/3/2026

All positions are located in San Diego County, are Permanent Fulltime with Hybrid telework, and have salaries above $4,000/month.
